ab: piyalralrang na sinsi kaninmu mukuwa i zenan harem kana wari.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: sazu a kengkeng i zenan kema i inani.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: piyalralrang na sinsi kaninmu mukuwa i ’uma harem kana wari.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: auwa ta penapitawa za dare’ ziyamaw?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: auwa ta i iyan harem kana wari?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: piyalralrang na sinsi kaninta mukuwa i zinanuman.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: auwa ta i iyan harem kana wari?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: piyalralrang na sinsi kaninta mukuwa i zenan.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: auwa ta i zinanuman harem kana wari?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: ’azi, piyalralrang na sinsi kaninta mukuwa i zenan.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: auwa ta i zenan harem kana wari?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: ’azi, auwa ta i ’uma harem kana wari.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: sinsi, auwa ta mena’uwa za eman i zinanuman?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: auwa ta mena’uwa za valruvalruran.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: auwa ta mena’uwa za valruvalrulren.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: auwa ta mena’uwa za valruvalrur.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sinsi, auwa ta i zenan mena’uwa za eman?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: auwa ta mena’uwa za ’alrivangvang.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: auwa ta mena’uwa za sirusirupan.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: auwa ta i ’uma kemakudaya?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: auwa ta i ’uma mena’uwa kananta sinalem na kudumu, taranapaw ulra a ’iyavurang zi a walru mu!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: auwa ta mena’uwa kananta sinalem na kadumu, taranapaw ulra a ’iyavureng zi a walru mu!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: piyalralrang na sinsi kaninta mukuwa i zinanuman melranguya?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: amelri, auwa ta mena’uwa za valruvalruran.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: amelri, piyalralrang na sinsi kaninta mukuwa mena’uwa za valruvalrulren.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: amelri, piyalralrang na sinsi kaninta mukuwa mena’uwa za valruvalrur.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sinsi, auwa ta i ’uma semalema za kulang?
ch: A:老師，我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: auwa ta penapitawa za dare’ harem kana wari.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: valriiviiyan a valruvalruran i kaziyu a.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: tatena’ ku za mau ku ziya mena’u za vaaw za valruvalruran harem.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: valriiviiyan a ’alrivangvang i kaziyu a.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: kiya kana vulay, sahar ku za ’alrivangvang.
ch: B:耶! 哇! 我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: valriiviiyan a ’alrivangvang i kaziyu a.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: amelri a ’alrivangvang izu, a walru i izu.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: na’una’u i kani, amanan mukuwa kana kaadawilran maw!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: ai, ’azi mi auwa kana kaadawilran.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: amanan pavekas! patawar kemakawang munu kuretapelra’ mu.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: maranger ku dikadika mena’u.
en: I want to see them right away.
